user.title: Ecobee Enhanced
user.description: Sign in with your ecobee account. Credentials are used once to obtain a token and are never stored.

mfa.title: Ecobee MFA Verification
mfa.description: Enter the verification code from your authenticator app.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Ecobee
reauth_confirm.description: Your ecobee session has expired. Please sign in again.

reauth_mfa.title: Ecobee MFA Verification
reauth_mfa.description: Enter the verification code from your authenticator app.

error.login_failed: Login failed. Check your credentials or try again later.
error.missing_credentials: Enter your email and password, or provide a refresh token.
error.no_refresh_token: Login succeeded but no refresh token was returned. Please try again.
error.invalid_mfa_code: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
error.mfa_failed: MFA verification failed. Please try again.
